TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Ｍiyamay = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang miyamay. 2,924 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 7,823 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 13% niqan 1,023 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 87% niqan 6,800 hiyi koia.
S.PHON: = *ijamaj = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ mijamaj. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia.
S.FORM: = Ｍiyamay = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang miyamay. 2,924 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 7,823 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 13% niqan 1,023 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 87% niqan 6,800 hiyi koia.
S.PHON: = *ijamaj = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ mijamaj. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia.
